# catalystcenter_wireless_fabric_multicast (Data Source)

This data source can read the Wireless Fabric Multicast.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "catalystcenter_wireless_fabric_multicast" "example" {
  fabric_id = "8e6f7b3a-2b0b-4a7d-8b1c-0d4b1cd5e1b1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `fabric_id` (String) The unique identifier of the fabric site

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The id of the object
- `multicast_enabled` (Boolean) Enable or disable wireless multicast for the fabric site
